text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto Racecourse is abuzz with cheers for the
Mejiro runners, proof of the great expectations
they've shouldered on their path to this moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what does it mean to face your fans? Ines
Fujin watches the Mejiro racers intently, hoping
to learn what it takes to answer fans'
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Ines to take on the two powerhouses
Mejiro Ryan and Mejiro McQueen. The spring
Tenno Sho awaits!
